purpose: Measure the complete longer V14-recipe curve with enough fresh paired seeds to reduce the standard error, retaining every eval node requested by the user.

scientific_status.reason: The V14 reward was selected from prior development experiments, and the 16-seed count, ten-step horizon, two-step cadence, complete curve, and analyses were selected after V14/V15 were visible. This registration fixes the new batch before any V16 outcome.

bound_history.disclosure: V14's favorable and unfavorable nodes, matched-control result, V15 partial values, and the adaptive program remain disclosed; V16 does not retroactively make them confirmatory.

candidate.control_difference_from_treatment: Only the two component-weight signs change.

early_complete_node_shape.criterion: M2 > M0, M4 >= M2, and M6 >= M4 on the 16-treatment-seed mean
early_complete_node_shape.remaining_nodes: M8 and M10 are always retained, reported, and plotted regardless of this gate.

primary_integrated_baseline.per_seed_effect: mean over s in {2,4,6,8,10} of treatment(seed,s)-treatment(seed,0)
primary_integrated_baseline.success: positive mean effect and nominal two-sided p <= 0.15

paired_integrated_control.per_seed_effect: mean over s in {2,4,6,8,10} of treatment(seed,s)-signflip(seed,s)
paired_integrated_control.success: positive mean effect and nominal two-sided p <= 0.15

secondary_terminal: step-10 treatment minus own baseline exact two-sided sign test
step-10 treatment minus seed-matched signflip exact two-sided sign test
predeclared_analysis.target_evidence: complete early-node shape plus successful primary integrated-baseline test; matched-control test is reported separately and is required for a causal reward-sign claim
report_regardless_of_result: all six nodes of every individual curve
condition means, sample standard deviations, and sample standard errors at all six nodes
machine-readable JSON/CSV and a plot containing every node
predeclared_analysis.multiplicity_caveat: Nominal adaptive development evidence only; not familywise-error-corrected.

terminal_verifier.authoritative_curve: validation_history.jsonl must contain exactly steps 0,2,4,6,8,10 in order.
terminal_verifier.trainer_validation_rows: log_history.json must contain exactly callback-emitted steps 2,4,6,8,10; baseline is absent.
terminal_verifier.learning_rate_rule: Missing LR is allowed only on validation-merged rows; present LR must equal 3e-6 within 1e-15.
terminal_verifier.reward_rule: Exactly one named J-lens reward and no correctness/GSM8K reward at every optimizer step 1 through 10.
terminal_verifier.duplicate_reward_std_rule: Generic and named float32 reward std values must be within four binary32 ULPs.
terminal_verifier.collector_rule: Drain and record every spawned call before aggregate failure.

tracking.canonical_x_axis: train/global_step for training; global_step for aggregate

execution.spawn_order: Seed-major pair-interleaved: jlens then signflip for seed 248, then jlens/signflip for 249, through 263.
execution.coordinator_preemption_recovery: A restarted coordinator may reattach only to an exact durable 32-call manifest for the same root call after verifying all immutable intents; it never respawns. Partial or inconsistent dispatch fails closed.
